sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Waste Management plans to build plant to turn landfill methane into useable natural gas
feed.summary: Waste Management (WM) plans to construct a new renewable natural gas plant at the Denver Arapahoe Disposal Site in Colorado. This project, a partnership with the City of Denver and Arapahoe County, aims to capture 98% of landfill methane, converting it into natural gas capable of powering almost 15,000 homes and WM's trash collection vehicles. The initiative is expected to significantly improve air quality by reducing methane and other harmful pollutants currently flared off.

feed.title: MSFT vs. ORCL: Which Enterprise Cloud & AI Stock Has Better Upside?
feed.summary: Microsoft (MSFT) and Oracle (ORCL) are both significant players in the enterprise cloud and AI sectors, investing heavily in infrastructure. While both reported strong fiscal results, Microsoft is favored as the superior investment due to its diversified business model, consistent revenue growth, and strong AI monetization capabilities. Oracle faces challenges with financing its massive capital expenditures and converting its backlog efficiently.

feed.title: MSCI Stock Surges 6.1% With A 7-day Winning Spree On Recent Analyst Upgrades
feed.summary: MSCI stock has risen 6.1% on the back of recent analyst upgrades, extending a 7-day winning streak. This surge highlights positive market sentiment and potentially increased investor confidence in the company.

feed.title: Japan Refunds Overpaid Tax On LogProstyle’s Dividend
feed.summary: LogProstyle Inc., a Japanese real estate and hospitality company, has announced that shareholders are eligible for a refund of overpaid Japanese withholding income tax on a recent cash dividend. This decision follows consultations with Japan’s National Tax Agency, clarifying the tax refund process. Shareholders must complete an application process to receive the refund.

feed.title: Levi & Korsinsky Invites Investors to SueWallSt After CarMax, Inc. Stock Collapse
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky has announced a class action lawsuit against CarMax, Inc. for alleged securities fraud that impacted investors who lost money between June 20, 2025, and November 5, 2025. Investors affected by the stock collapse are encouraged to contact Levi & Korsinsky to pursue potential claims. The firm, a leading securities litigation specialist, offers a podcast and WhatsApp channel for updates on class action news.

It highlights the company's strategic focus on "Pro" customers, its preliminary guidance versus analysts' expectations, and the critical "Market Recovery Case" for potential upside. feed.title: Salesforce (CRM) Stock News Today: Agentforce AI Momentum, Analyst Price Targets, and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: Salesforce (CRM) shares are hovering around $266, driven by momentum in its Agentforce AI platform and capital return program. The company raised its fiscal 2026 guidance based on accelerating AI product demand, with Agentforce + Data 360 ARR reaching nearly $1.4 billion. Investors are now focused on how this AI adoption translates into sustained, paid growth and wider market sentiment ahead of Monday's market open and into the new year.

feed.title: Merck (MRK) Stock Update: FDA Fast-Track Vouchers, TrumpRx Pricing Deal, and Analyst Targets as Wall Street Heads Into New Year Week
feed.summary: Merck (MRK) shares are gaining momentum heading into the new year, driven by its inclusion in a U.S. drug-pricing deal and new FDA priority vouchers accelerating its drug review timelines. The company is actively diversifying its pipeline beyond Keytruda through acquisitions and new oncology data, aiming to address long-term growth concerns. While analysts anticipate modest upside, the stock's future hinges on successful pipeline execution and navigation of policy risks.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble (PG) Stock Update: Latest Price, News, Analyst Forecasts, and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open

It details the challenges of navigating defensive demand versus cautious consumer behavior, the impact of tariffs, and the company's dividend record. feed.title: PepsiCo Stock (NASDAQ: PEP) Update: Elliott Pressure, 2026 Outlook, Dividend Tailwinds—and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: PepsiCo (NASDAQ: PEP) is facing activist pressure from Elliott Investment Management, driving actions to improve competitiveness in North America through cost cuts, pricing tiers, and product line simplification. The company has reaffirmed its 2025 financial outlook and provided a preliminary positive 2026 outlook. Investors are also monitoring legal headlines regarding alleged pricing inflation with Walmart and the company's consistent dividend increases.

feed.title: Holiday Travel Chaos: JetBlue, Delta, American, United Flights Cancelled As Winter Storm Devin Strikes Northeast US
feed.summary: A powerful winter storm named Devin caused widespread flight cancellations and delays across the Northeast U.S. on Friday, disrupting holiday travel. Thousands of flights were affected, with New York airports experiencing the worst disruptions. Several airlines, including JetBlue, Delta, American, and United, canceled hundreds of flights, and states of emergency were declared in New York and New Jersey.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. - ARE
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is reminding investors who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 in Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) to file lead plaintiff applications by January 26, 2026. This class action lawsuit alleges the company failed to disclose material information between January 27, 2025, and October 27, 2025, leading to a significant stock price drop after disappointing Q3 2025 financial results and a $323.9 million real estate impairment charge.

feed.title: F5 Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against F5, Inc. - FFIV
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is alerting investors of F5, Inc. (NasdaqGS: FFIV) who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 to a lead plaintiff deadline of February 17, 2026, in a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges F5 and its executives failed to disclose material information between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025, leading to a significant stock price drop after disappointing Q4 fiscal year 2025 results and a security breach involving its BIG-IP product were revealed. Investors are encouraged to seek legal options and learn more through ClaimsFiler.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. - ARE
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler is alerting investors of Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) who suffered losses exceeding $100,000 to file lead plaintiff applications by January 26, 2026. This class action lawsuit alleges that Alexandria and its executives failed to disclose material information, leading to a significant stock price drop following the announcement of lower-than-expected Q3 2025 financial results. The decline was attributed to reduced occupancy rates, slower leasing, and a substantial real estate impairment charge.

feed.title: CarMax Shareholder Alert: ClaimsFiler Reminds Investors With Losses In Excess Of $100,000 Of Lead Plaintiff Deadline In Class Action Lawsuits Against CarMax, Inc. - KMX
feed.summary: ClaimsFiler reminds investors that the lead plaintiff deadline in a securities class action lawsuit against CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) is January 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges CarMax failed to disclose material information between June 20, 2025, and November 5, 2025, leading to an $11.5 per share drop following its Q2 FY2026 financial results announcement. Investors with losses exceeding $100,000 are encouraged to contact ClaimsFiler for evaluation of their legal options.

feed.title: NIO's battery asset operator Mirattery completes 1 billion yuan Series C round
feed.summary: Mirattery, NIO's battery asset operator, has successfully closed a Series C funding round, raising nearly 1 billion CNY. The financing includes new contributions from founding shareholders and state-owned capital investors, broadening support for its battery operations and R&D. Mirattery manages over 35 GWh of battery assets for more than 500,000 NIO users, central to NIO's Battery-as-a-Service model.

feed.title: The Eastern Company Declares 342nd Consecutive Quarterly Cash Dividend
feed.summary: The Eastern Company (NASDAQ: EML) announced its 342nd consecutive quarterly cash dividend of eleven cents ($0.11) per share. This dividend is payable on March 13, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 13, 2026. The company manages industrial businesses with operations in several countries.

feed.title: Hong Kong’s Operation Santa Claus boosted by Morgan Stanley’s enduring support
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley is set to be Operation Santa Claus's top corporate supporter for the ninth consecutive year, reinforcing a 29-year partnership through its "building bridges" campaign. The firm contributed HK$8.8 million this year, benefiting multiple charities and disaster relief, illustrating its long-term commitment to community giving. This ongoing support reflects the company's belief in empathy, understanding, and shared responsibility.

feed.title: Thousands of Southeast Michigan residents without power due to ice on utility lines
feed.summary: Thousands of residents in Southeast Michigan are without power due to ice accumulating on utility lines, causing outages. DTE Energy is working to restore electricity for over 14,000 customers, with Consumers Energy reporting an additional 24,000 outages in Mid-Michigan. The freezing rain on Friday also created hazardous driving conditions.

feed.title: JFK, LaGuardia flight delays live updates: Latest Delta, JetBlue, Qatar, American, Southwest status today | Hindustan Times
feed.summary: A winter storm in New York on Friday caused widespread flight disruptions at JFK, LaGuardia, and Newark airports, leading to thousands of delays and cancellations. JetBlue and Delta Air Lines experienced the highest number of cancellations. The National Weather Service issued a warning for 5 to 9 inches of snow and urged extreme caution for travelers.

feed.title: Key facts: Biohaven Ltd. develops BHV-7000 for epilepsy; J.P. Morgan reports poor trial results
feed.summary: Biohaven Ltd. (BHVN) is developing BHV-7000 for epilepsy, with analysts recommending a strong buy due to its potential and safety despite recent negative pipeline news. However, J.P. Morgan reported poor trial results for Biohaven, suggesting these results may not improve the company's fundamentals or market outlook. A data presentation for the drug is scheduled for January 2026.

feed.title: Thousands of Southeast Michigan residents without power due to ice on utility lines
feed.summary: Thousands of residents in Southeast Michigan are currently without power due to ice accumulating on utility lines following Friday's freezing rain. DTE Energy is working to restore service for over 14,000 customers, primarily in Oakland County, with Consumers Energy reporting outages for an additional 24,000 people in Mid-Michigan. Restoration for many DTE customers is expected between Friday night and early Saturday.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Stock (GS) Outlook: Year-End Rally, M&A Momentum, and What to Watch Before Monday’s Open
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs (GS) is ending 2025 with shares near $907, driven by a strong year-end market, a rebound in M&A and equity underwriting, and a more favorable regulatory environment for banks. Investors are looking for continued proof of performance, especially with analyst price targets often below current trading levels. Key watchpoints for early 2026 include interest rate shifts, continued dealmaking headlines, regulatory developments, and the company's Q4 2025 earnings report on January 15, 2026.

feed.title: MGM Grand to reopen Avenue Café in January
feed.summary: The MGM Grand in Las Vegas is reopening its popular Avenue Café in January, replacing the temporary Netflix BITES space. This breakfast and lunch restaurant will resume operations on January 12th, while Netflix BITES concludes its one-year run on January 4th. Other brunch options remain available at the resort.

feed.title: How LogProstyle’s Japanese Tax Refund Benefits Shareholders Worldwide
feed.summary: LogProstyle Inc., a real estate, hotel, and restaurant management company listed on the NYSE (LGPS), announced that it will refund previously over-withheld Japanese withholding tax on cash dividends to all eligible shareholders, including non-residents and foreign shareholders. The company identified that the initial 20.42% withholding rate was excessive for many shareholder classes, with the correct rate often being 15.315% or even 0% for some individuals. LogProstyle Inc. is guiding shareholders through the application process, emphasizing that while they aim for expeditious refunds, the process is subject to Japanese tax authority approval and potential delays from policy changes.

feed.title: Apple Stock (AAPL) Outlook: China iPhone Demand Surprise, App Store Regulatory Pressure, and Wall Street Forecasts Ahead of Monday’s Open
feed.summary: Apple Inc. (AAPL) closed trading at $273.40, navigating a mix of encouraging iPhone demand signals from China and increasing global regulatory challenges concerning its App Store and Apple Watch. Investors are closely monitoring strong Chinese shipment data and potential impacts from ongoing legal disputes and regulatory changes in Brazil, Italy, and the EU, which could affect Apple's Services profitability. Wall Street forecasts show an average price target around $283-$299, with investors awaiting further catalysts and Apple's Q1 2026 earnings around January 29, 2026.

feed.title: Southpoint Trims Stake in Fennec Pharmaceuticals to 8%
feed.summary: Southpoint Capital Advisors LP has reduced its stake in Fennec Pharmaceuticals Inc. (TSE:FRX), selling 1 million common shares at USD$7.50 each. Following this transaction, Southpoint now holds approximately 2.7 million common shares, representing about 8% of Fennec's fully diluted share base, and indicated that its holdings might change further. While Fennec shows strong revenue growth, profitability issues and a weak balance sheet remain concerns, according to TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark.

(NYSE: EXPD) to $136 from $130, maintaining a Hold rating, as the firm anticipates transport stocks to prioritize supply rationalization and cost-focused self-help in 2026. feed.title: GOOG Stock Today: Alphabet Class C Holds Near $315 After Holiday Session as AI Power Deals and Antitrust Risks Shape the 2026 Outlook
feed.summary: Alphabet's Class C shares (NASDAQ: GOOG) closed near $314.96 after the post-Christmas session, influenced by a mix of AI-driven capital expenditure, cloud momentum, and ongoing regulatory/antitrust headlines. Key developments include a $4.75 billion acquisition of Intersect to support AI infrastructure, a significant security partnership with Palo Alto Networks for Google Cloud, and the clearance of the Wiz acquisition by the U.S. Justice Department. Investors are also weighing AI copyright litigation and the impact of antitrust rulings, while looking ahead to the Q4 earnings report in early February 2026 for further insights into monetization and capex guidance.

feed.title: C aesars Sportsbook Opening 2026 in Rampart Casino Las Vegas
feed.summary: C aesars Entertainment and Rampart Casino are partnering to open a new Caesars Sportsbook at The Resort at Summerlin in 2026, pending regulatory approval. The new sportsbook will replace the existing one and feature state-of-the-art technology, including a 360-degree LED video wall and 20 self-service betting kiosks. This expansion aims to meet the demand for high-quality sports betting in the Summerlin community, leveraging Caesars' proprietary technology and its Universal Digital Wallet.

The company currently holds a Zacks Rank of #1 (Strong Buy), with its full-year earnings consensus estimate increasing by 37.5% over the past three months, indicating strong analyst sentiment. Investors interested in Retail-Wholesale stocks should monitor FGI and Expedia (EXPE), another strong performer in the sector.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Trims Costco (COST) Target Amid Mixed Retail Backdrop
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Edward Kelly lowered the price target for Costco Wholesale Corporation (COST) to $900 from $1,000 while maintaining an Equal Weight rating, citing a mixed retail environment for 2026. Despite this, Costco's membership model, with high renewal rates in the US and Canada and growth in executive memberships, continues to show stability and future earnings visibility, supporting its expansion plans. The firm is constructive on broadlines and food service, but suggests food retail faces more challenges, making company-specific drivers crucial.
